components.name: CategoryHero
interactions: Primary CTA navigates to the featured accessory PDP
Secondary CTA scrolls to category/product grid
Category shortcut applies the matching family filter

components.name: ProductFamilyGrid
interactions: Click family sets the category filter
Active card receives selected border state

components.name: AccessoryProductCard
interactions: Quick add pushes item into mini cart
Compare toggles selection up to three items
Card link opens PDP template

components.name: QuickAddButton
interactions: Click adds one item to cart
Button text briefly changes to Added

components.name: BundleBuilderPanel
interactions: Add bundle creates a bundle cart line
Panel CTA opens the cart drawer

components.name: AccessoryPdpGallery
interactions: Thumbnail click updates hero image
Variant click may update hero image

components.name: AccessoryBuyStack
interactions: Variant changes title/price/image context
Quantity stepper updates line total
CTA adds selected configuration to mini cart

components.name: AccessorySpecsAccordion
interactions: Click header toggles panel and aria-expanded

components.name: RelatedProductsRail
interactions: Quick add related item
Link to PDP template

components.name: MiniCartDrawer

props.items: Array<{id, title, variant, quantity, price, image}>

interactions: Open from nav, quick add, or buy stack
Overlay/close/Escape closes
Quantity controls update totals
Remove deletes line
